runs.title: P174 — Read-only baseline
runs.excerpt:
Kör read-only baseline v22: söker kontext och startar `smoke:predeploy:build` samt marathon-yolo-vakt.
Verifierar subagentens leverans: läser eval-dokument och state-fil.
**Plattform:** Cursor · **Modell:** Composer · **Agent:** marathon-yolo-vakt (delegerad)

---

## P174 baseline — klar

### 1. Vad som ändrades
- **Skapad:** `docs/evaluations/2026-07-14-yolo-v22-baseline.md` — read-only baseline (design-debt, smoke-matris, build-stats, module-lock, GAPs)
- **Uppdaterad:** `.orkester/cursor-yolo-state-v22.json` — `p174-baseline` completed → `currentTaskId`: `p175-auto-lock-hygiene`
- **Ingen kodändring** — smoke grön utan fix

### 2. Smoke-resultat: **PASS**
`npm run smoke:predeploy:build` — exit **0**, ~**78s**

| Steg | Resultat |
|------|----------|
| `functions` tsc | OK |
| Vite build (8.0.16) | 4200 moduler, `index.css` gzip **60.86 kB** |
| Tier-1 smokes | Alla PASS |
| `smoke:e2e-locked-ux` | **10/10** (27.2s) |
| `smoke:module-lock` | **22/22** locked |
| `smoke:executive-home-visual` | PASS (screenshot SKIP — ingen dev-server på :5174) |

### 3. Blocker
**Ingen** — inget SKIP krävdes.

---

**Slutsats:** P174 baseline **PASS** → startgate **GO** för P175 auto-lock hygiene.

Ingen kodändring i PMIR-zon.

### 2. Smoke-resultat: **PASS**

`npm run smoke:predeploy:build` — exit **0**, ~**79s**

- functions `tsc` + vite build OK (4200 moduler)
- Full tier-1 predeploy grön (manifest, orkester, agents-ui 8/8, governance 22/22 locked, widgets WH8+v3, valv-security, e2e-locked-ux **10/10**, cost-guard m.fl.)
- `executive-home-visual` screenshot **SKIP** (ingen dev-server på :5174) — godkänd per etablerat mönster

### 3. GO/NO-GO: **GO**

| Fas | Status |
|-----|--------|
| P173 Deploy | **SKIP** (PMIR — väntar Pontus OK) |
| P174–P181 | **PASS** (alla evals gröna) |
| P182 Slutgate | **PASS** |

### 4. Blocker

**Inga.** Info-GAP (ej blockerande):
- P173 deploy väntar explicit OK
- Saknad GEMINI audit-källa i preflight-sync
- VALV-CHAT-E2E kräver manuell app + Fyren + biometri

### 5. Handoff v23

**Klar** — v23 redo (P183→P192). Starta nästa marathon med:

```bash
npm run cursor:yolo:v23 -- master
```

eller klistra in `.cursor/pipeline/yolo-v23/START-PROMPT.md` i ny Agent-chatt.

---

**YOLO v22 marathon avslutad — GO.**
